sections.label: Section 5.7.941c
sections.translation: What ’ s the matter ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.942
sections.translation: Another wife at Lemnos —

sections.label: Section 5.7.942b
sections.translation: I ’ m ruined !

sections.label: Section 5.7.942c
sections.translation: By whom he had a daughter ; and her he is secretly bringing up .

sections.label: Section 5.7.943b
sections.translation: I ’ m dead and buried !

sections.label: Section 5.7.944
sections.original: Haec adeo ego illi iam denarrabo .
sections.translation: This I shall assuredly now inform her of .

sections.label: Section 5.7.944b
sections.translation: I beg of you ,

sections.label: Section 5.7.945
sections.translation: don ’ t do so .

sections.label: Section 5.7.945b
sections.original: Oh , tune is eras ? Ut ludos facit .
sections.translation: Oh , were you the person ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.946
sections.translation: We ’ ll let you off .

sections.label: Section 5.7.946b
sections.translation: Nonsense .

sections.label: Section 5.7.946c
sections.translation: What would you have ? We ’ ll forgive you the money you ’ ve got ,

sections.label: Section 5.7.947b
sections.translation: I hear you . Why the plague , then , do you two trifle with me in this way , you silly men , with your childish speeches —

sections.label: Section 5.7.950
sections.original: Nolo , volo : volo , nolo rursum : cedo , cape .
sections.translation: I won ’ t , and I will ; I will , and I won ’ t , over again : keep it , give it me back ; what has been said , is unsaid ; what had been just a bargain , is now no bargain .

sections.label: Section 5.7.952
sections.original: Quo pacto aut unde haec hic rescivit ?
sections.translation: In what manner , or from whom has he come to know of this ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.952b
sections.translation: I don ’ t , know ; but that I ’ ve told it to no one , I know for certain .

sections.label: Section 5.7.954
sections.original: Monstri , ita me Di ament , simile .
sections.translation: So may the Gods bless me , ’ tis as good as a miracle .

sections.label: Section 5.7.954b
sections.translation: I ’ ve graveled them .

sections.label: Section 5.7.954c
sections.translation: Well now ,

sections.label: Section 5.7.955
sections.original: Hicine ut a nobis hoc tantum argenti auferat ,
sections.translation: is he to be carrying off [*] from us such a sum of money as this , and so palpably to impose upon us ? By heavens , I ’ d sooner die . Manage to show yourself of resolute and ready wit . You see that this slip of yours has got abroad , and that you can not now possibly conceal it from your wife ;

sections.label: Section 5.7.960
sections.original: Nunc quod ipsa ex aliis auditura sit , Chreme ,
sections.translation: it is then more conducive to our quiet , Chremes , ourselves to disclose what she will be hearing from others ; and then , in our own fashion , we shall be able to take vengeance upon this dirty fellow .

sections.label: Section 5.7.963b
sections.translation: Good lack-a-day , now ’ s the sticking-point , if I don ’ t look out for myself . They are making toward me with a gladiatorial air .

sections.label: Section 5.7.965
sections.translation: But I doubt whether it ’ s possible for her to be appeased .

sections.label: Section 5.7.965b
sections.translation: Be of good courage ; I ’ ll effect a reconciliation between you ; remembering this , Chremes , that she is dead and gone [*] by whom you had this girl .

sections.label: Section 5.7.968
sections.original: Itane agitis mecum ? Satis astute aggredimini .
sections.translation: Is this the way you are going to deal with me ? Very cleverly done . Come on with you . By heavens , Demipho , you have provoked me , not to his advantage ( pointing at CHREMES ) .

sections.label: Section 5.7.970
sections.original: Ain tu ? Ubi quae libitum fuerit peregre feceris ,
sections.translation: How say you ? ( addressing CHREMES ) . When you ’ ve been doing abroad just as you pleased , and have had no regard for this excellent lady here , but on the contrary , have been injuring her in an unheard-of manner , would you be coming to me with prayers to wash away your offenses ? On telling her of this , I ’ ll make her so incensed with you ,

sections.label: Section 5.7.975
sections.original: Ut ne restinguas lacrimis si exstillaveris .
sections.translation: that you sha ’ n ’ t quench her , though you should melt away into tears .

sections.label: Section 5.7.976
sections.original: Malum quod isti Di Deaeque omnes duiut .
sections.translation: A plague may all the Gods and Goddesses send upon him . That any fellow should be possessed of so much impudence ! Does not this villain deserve to be transported hence to some desolate land at the public charge ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.979b
sections.translation: I am brought to such a pass ,

sections.label: Section 5.7.980
sections.original: Ut quid agam cum illo nesciam prorsum .
sections.translation: that I really don ’ t know what to do in it .

sections.label: Section 5.7.980b
sections.translation: I know ; let ’ s go into court .

sections.label: Section 5.7.981b
sections.original: In ius ? huc , si quid libet .
sections.translation: Into court ? Here in preference ( pointing to CHREMES ’ S house ) , if it suits you in any way .

sections.label: Section 5.7.982
sections.original: Assequere ac retine , dum ego huc servos evoco .
sections.translation: Follow him , and hold him back , till I call out the servants .

sections.label: Section 5.7.983
sections.translation: But I can ’ t by myself ; run and help me .

sections.label: Section 5.7.983b
sections.translation: There ’ s one action of damages against you .

sections.label: Section 5.7.984b
sections.translation: Sue him at law , then .

sections.label: Section 5.7.984c
sections.translation: And another with you , Chremes .

sections.label: Section 5.7.985
sections.translation: Lay hold of him . ( They both drag him .)

sections.label: Section 5.7.985b
sections.original: Itane agitis ? enimvero voce est opus .
sections.translation: Is it thus you do ? Why then I must exert my voice : Nausistrata , come out ( calling aloud ) .

sections.label: Section 5.7.986b
sections.translation: Stop his mouth .

sections.label: Section 5.7.986c
sections.translation: See how strong the rascal is .

sections.label: Section 5.7.987b
sections.translation: Nausistrata , I say .

sections.label: Section 5.7.987c
sections.translation: Will you not hold your tongue ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.988
sections.translation: Hold my tongue ?

sections.label: Section 5.7.988b
sections.original: Nisi sequitur , pugnos in ventrem ingere .
sections.translation: If he won ’ t follow , plant your fists in his stomach .

sections.label: Section 5.7.989
sections.original: Vel oculum exclude : est ubi vos ulciscar probe .
sections.translation: Or e ’ en gouge out an eye . The time ’ s coming when I shall have a full revenge on you .

sections.label: Section 5.8.990
sections.translation: Who calls my name ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.990b
sections.translation: Ha !

sections.label: Section 5.8.990c
sections.translation: My husband , pray what means this disturbance ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.991b
sections.translation: Oh , oh , why are you mute now ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.991c
sections.translation: Who is this man ? Won ’ t you answer me ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.992b
sections.translation: What , he to answer you ? who , upon my faith , doesn ’ t know where he is .

sections.label: Section 5.8.993b
sections.translation: Take care how you believe that fellow in any thing .

sections.label: Section 5.8.994
sections.original: Abi , tange : si non totus friget , me enica .
sections.translation: Go , touch him ; if he isn ’ t in a cold sweat all over , why then kill me .

sections.label: Section 5.8.995
sections.translation: ’ Tis nothing at all .

sections.label: Section 5.8.995b
sections.original: Quid ergo est ? quid istic narrat ?
sections.translation: What is it , then , that this person is talking about ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.995c
sections.translation: You shall know directly ; listen now .

sections.label: Section 5.8.996b
sections.translation: Are you resolved to believe him ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.996c
sections.translation: Pray , how can I believe him , when he has told me nothing ?

sections.label: Section 5.8.997b
sections.translation: The poor creature is distracted from fright .
